item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":true,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.93,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"一诊排队投诉，护士站贴提示"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"二诊漏带证件，前台补说明"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"三诊找不到取号口，公众号挂提醒"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"请在入口页加一条说明"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"每次患者在就诊链路中遇到阻塞，就把阻塞点局部包装成提示文案"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"明早就要上线；这次只要临时放这一条说明"}],"abstain_reason":""}
